---
title: "alfred_observer.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\alfred_observer.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.27
style_score: 3.36
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.19
---

## Intent
The `alfred_observer.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on AlfredOverwatch, analyze_failure, write_suggestion. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via AlfredOverwatch, analyze_failure, write_suggestion. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `AlfredOverwatch`
- `analyze_failure`
- `write_suggestion`
